sections.heading: Everything your team needs
sections.lead: From submission to resolution, SmartRoute replaces scattered emails and rigid spreadsheets with a calm, connected workflow.
paragraphs: From submission to resolution, SmartRoute replaces scattered emails and rigid spreadsheets with a calm, connected workflow.
Where precision meets artisan design.
Requests find the right approver automatically based on type, urgency, department, and workload — no manual triage needed.
Multi-stage approvals with conditions, delegation, and out-of-office coverage — nothing falls through the cracks.
Avg resolution time
SLA compliance

sections.heading: Three steps. Zero chaos.
sections.lead: From request to resolution in a flow that feels natural — not another learning curve.
paragraphs: From request to resolution in a flow that feels natural — not another learning curve.
Employees fill a smart form tailored to the request type — no guesswork, no wrong channels.
The engine evaluates rules, workload, and availability to find the right approver instantly.
Real-time SLA tracking, status updates, and satisfaction feedback — all in one place.

sections.lead: "SmartRoute transformed our operations team from a queue of tickets into a network of connected people. The empathy built into their workflow engine is palpable."
paragraphs: "SmartRoute transformed our operations team from a queue of tickets into a network of connected people. The empathy built into their workflow engine is palpable."
Priya Anand
Head of IT, Meridian Tech
"We cut our average resolution time by 60% in the first month. But what surprised us most was how much calmer the team felt — no more chasing approvals through email chains."
Marcus Chen
VP Operations, Atlas Corp
